changeSet.author: analyze-logs
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE static_referer ( label TEXT NOT NULL, domain TEXT, domain_starts_with TEXT, domain_ends_with TEXT )

changeSet.author: analyze-logs
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO static_referer (label, domain, domain_starts_with, domain_ends_with) VALUES ('Google', NULL, 'google.', NULL), ('Facebook', 'facebook.com', NULL, NULL), ('Babelio', 'babelio.com', NULL, NULL), ('Qwant', 'qwant.com', NULL, NULL), ('DuckDuckGo', 'duckduckgo.com', NULL, NULL), ('Bing', 'bing.com', NULL, NULL), ('Yahoo', NULL, NULL, 'yahoo.com'), ('Brave', NULL, NULL, 'brave.com'), ('InoReader', 'inoreader.com', NULL, NULL), ('Ecosia', 'ecosia.org', NULL, NULL), ('Kagi', 'kagi.com', NULL, NULL)
